title: SimVG: A Simple Framework for Visual Grounding with Decoupled Multi-modal Fusion
task_description: Predicting corresponding regions of an image through linguistic expressions

visual_grounding_types.description: Locating all objects mentioned in a sentence within an image
Only one target corresponding to a sentence
Sentence can have multiple targets or no target at all

existing_model_categories.description: Require a pre-trained detector to generate proposals and perform localization through region-text retrieval
Employ an end-to-end architecture, performing dense prediction on multimodal fusion features
Adopt an encoder-decoder architecture to perform multimodal fusion in the encoder and then decode the response target position

simvg_approach.method: Utilizes Multi-Modality Encoder for multimodal interaction among object, image, and text tokens
simvg_approach.implementation: Directly applies a lightweight MLP for grounding

figures.title: Overview of visual grounding structures
figures.description: Shows different approaches: Two-Stage, One-Stage, Transformer-based, and Proposed SimVG

figures.title: The expression length and relative improvement between Dynamic MDETR and SimVG
